creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
After I upgrading abseil from version 20230125.3 to 20240722.0 the build process for the mysql80-server fails with this message:

ld-elf.so.1: /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/.build/runtime_output_directory/protoc-24.4.0: Undefined symbol "_ZN4absl12lts_2023080213time_internal4cctz15local_time_zoneEv" 

Maybe these are related:

https://bugs.mysql.com/bug.php?id=113045
https://github.com/mysql/mysql-server/pull/544
